note: Contract inventory for this Balancer V2/V3 onboarding pass. Cover entries are user pre-sign contracts with committed manifests and ABI coverage. Exclude entries are protocol infra/core contracts or user paths intentionally deferred with explicit reasons.

contracts.reason: user pre-sign entry: V2 Vault.swap and setRelayerApproval are covered by manifests; remaining Vault functions are explicitly triaged in coverage

contracts.reason: protocol factory/infra, not a retail wallet swap or permission pre-sign entry

contracts.reason: Vault implementation/extension infra behind core Vault flow, not a direct covered user entry

contracts.name: Balancer V3 ProtocolFeeController (mainnet)
contracts.reason: protocol fee infra/admin surface, not a retail wallet pre-sign entry point

contracts.name: Balancer V3 BatchRouter (mainnet)
contracts.reason: COVERED (#2, 2026-06-04): V3 BatchRouter user surface = swapExactIn (aggregate Amm::Swap via balancer_v3_swap_path_field) + permitBatchAndCall (multicall_recurse). ~68%/32% of recent direct tx. Surface snapshot + coverage at surface/balancer/v3-batchrouter-mainnet.{abi,coverage}.json. swapExactOut/multicall deferred (0 recent tx).

contracts.name: Balancer V3 CompositeLiquidityRouter v2 (mainnet)
contracts.reason: COVERED (#3, 2026-06-04): ERC4626/boosted pool liquidity (addLiquidityProportional/UnbalancedToERC4626Pool, removeLiquidityProportionalFromERC4626Pool) + permitBatchAndCall, decoded via the baked balancer_v3:composite_pool_tokens map (reuses the #1 V3 pool universe + balancer_v3_zip_pool_tokens $fn). Surface at v3-composite-router-v2-mainnet.{abi,coverage}.json.

contracts.name: Balancer V2 BalancerRelayer (BatchRelayer v6, mainnet)
contracts.reason: DEFERRED user-facing relayer (1st-party v2/tasks/20231031-batch-relayer-v6; high usage — active 2026-06-03, ~150 recent direct tx). This is the address users authorize via Vault.setRelayerApproval (the GRANT itself IS covered by vault-set-relayer-approval). Direct calls are multicall(bytes[]) of BatchRelayerLibrary actions; needs a relayer-library multicall decoder. Follow-up #3.

contracts.name: Balancer V3 Router v1 (mainnet, deprecated)
contracts.reason: DEFERRED deprecated router (1st-party v3/deprecated/20241205-v3-router; low/trailing usage — 293 lifetime direct tx, superseded by Router v2). Shares most selectors with Router v2; could be added to the Router-v2 manifests' chain_to_addresses in a follow-up.

contracts.name: Balancer V3 BufferRouter (mainnet)
contracts.reason: DEFERRED niche user-facing router (1st-party v3/tasks/20241205-v3-buffer-router; low usage — 44 lifetime direct tx). ERC-4626 buffer add/remove; no current ActionBody model for buffer liquidity. Follow-up.

contracts.name: Balancer V3 UnbalancedAddViaSwapRouter (mainnet)
contracts.reason: DEFERRED new user-facing router (1st-party v3/tasks/20251010-v3-unbalanced-add-via-swap-router; near-zero adoption — 1 direct tx). Add-liquidity-via-swap; defer until adoption warrants. Follow-up.

contracts.name: Balancer V3 AggregatorRouter (mainnet)
contracts.reason: integrator-facing (1st-party v3/tasks/20250218-v3-aggregator-router): DEX aggregators pre-pay the Vault then call this via internal calls; not a retail EOA wallet pre-sign entry (1 direct EOA tx = deploy only).

contracts.name: Balancer V3 AggregatorBatchRouter (mainnet)
contracts.reason: integrator-facing (1st-party v3/tasks/20250507-v3-aggregator-batch-router): aggregator multi-hop variant, called via internal calls; not a retail EOA wallet pre-sign entry (1 direct EOA tx = deploy only).

contracts.name: Balancer V2 BalancerQueries (mainnet)
contracts.reason: read-only off-chain query simulation (1st-party v2/tasks/20220721-balancer-queries); not a fund-moving wallet pre-sign entry.

contracts.name: Balancer V2 ProtocolFeesWithdrawer (mainnet)
contracts.reason: governance/admin protocol-fee withdrawal (1st-party v2/tasks/20220517-protocol-fee-withdrawer); not a retail wallet pre-sign entry.
